assertions.description: INCORRECT: In the ESP32-adapter schematic, 5V is used as a net label (Text Label, not a power symbol) connecting the USB/input voltage rail across two locations on the schematic. Despite '5V' being an unambiguous power rail name, the net_classification assigns it 'signal'. The statistics section lists only GND as a power rail, omitting the 5V supply. This is a net-name-heuristic miss for voltage-labelled nets that use wire labels instead of KiCad power symbols.
